content:
--What is your proudest accomplishment in your career?
My proudest accomplishment in my career has been the journey from starting out as a clerk answering phones at the Miami Herald to eventually becoming its executive editor. This transformation represents years of dedication, hard work, and continual growth, that allowed me to take on the leadership at one of the most respected news organizations. It is a testament to the opportunities for advancement and the support for personal and professional development that the Miami Herald provided throughout my career.
Alex
